title: Advanced Medieval Vanilla
body:
# Advanced medieval vanilla
A vanilla-like modpack but with a fun medieval twist.

## Features
### - Advanced nethite 
Makes more stages of nethrite armor.
### - Farmers' delight
Adds a bunch more foods and crops
### - Bosses of Mass Destruction
Adds four new bosses found in caves, cold boimes, the nether, and the end
### - Dungeons and Tavrens
Adds fun to explore buildings around the world
### - medieval buildings
Adds more fun buildings to explore, with some being in the end
### - Dungeons+
Adds dungeons with look and mobs to fight
### - Epic Knights 
Adds medieval shield and armor
### - Ranged weapon
Adds better bows, which are good, but some cost a lot
### - packed up
Adds backpacks to the game
### - Roughly Enough Items
Don't know how to craft something? That's ok because Roughly Enough Items will tell you what you don't know about crafting
### - Quality of Life Mods
Not just one mod but a bunch that make your Minecraft experience a more fun and entertaining time
